Title: Authorizes seniors and persons who are severely disabled to use an ATV to enter and exit certain lands for ice fishing
Summary: Authorizes seniors and persons who are severely disabled to use an ATV to enter and exit certain lands where ice fishing is permitted by the department of environmental conservation when conditions are reasonably safe for the operation of ATV's.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to authorizing certain persons to use an ATV to enter and exit certain lands for ice fishing
